calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Order
Off Calendar Apr-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Julia M. Adams, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Lindy Kwong
Roger R. Rubin, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Petchratana Dechanu

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Lindy Kwong's motion for an assignment order is granted in the amount of $925 per month. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn For Reconsideration Of Assignment Order
Off Calendar Mar-20-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Roger R. Rubin, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Petchratana Dechanu
Mark Epstein, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Lindy Kwong

AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Petchratana Dechanu's motion for reconsideration of assignment order.
The Court will exercise its discretion and not consider the late-filed opposition. The motion to reconsider and set aside the prior order is granted. The granting of the motion is without prejudice to plaintiff re-filing the underlying motion. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion For Assignment Order
Off Calendar Feb-06-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Lindy Kwong's motion for an assignment order is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Order
Off Calendar Dec-14-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE. Plaintiff Lindy Kwong's motion for an assignment order is ordered off calendar FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CCP Section 1005. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
